console.title: Control panel
console.description: System metrics, Premium revenue, and user management. Only accounts with the Administrator role can access this area.

range.label: Date range
range.invalid: Invalid date range — please pick again.

dashboard.title: Metrics
dashboard.subtitle: Figures based on account metadata only. No ledger data of any kind.

distributions.tierChartLabel: User distribution by tier. See the table below for details.
distributions.roleChartLabel: User distribution by role. See the table below for details.
distributions.statusChartLabel: User distribution by status. See the table below for details.

signups.title: Signups over time
signups.chartLabel: Signup count per period. See the table below for details.
signups.empty: No signups in this range yet.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.subtitle: Sum of Premium GRANTs. Revokes do not count toward revenue.

kpi.totalHint: Sum of Premium GRANTs — computed by the server, shown verbatim

chart.title: Revenue over time
chart.chartLabel: Premium revenue per period. See the table below for details.

references.title: Payment references (most recent)
references.empty: No references in this range yet.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Shows account metadata + Premium-grant figures only. No ledger data.
users.caption: User list

states.emptyBody: Try changing the filters or search term.

notFound.title: User not found
notFound.body: This user doesn't exist or has been removed. Check the link or go back to the list.

grant.title: Grant Premium
grant.body: Record a Premium grant (the amount counts toward revenue).

revoke.title: Revoke Premium?
revoke.body: The account returns to the Free tier. Revokes do NOT count toward revenue.

disable.title: Disable this account?
disable.body: The user will be signed out of every device and unable to sign in until re-enabled.
disable.warning: Disabling revokes all sessions and blocks sign-in. The user's data is not deleted.

enable.title: Enable account?
enable.body: The user will be able to sign in again. No data is affected.

revokeTokens.title: Sign out of all devices?
revokeTokens.body: All of the user's current sessions are revoked immediately. They can still sign in again.

promote.title: Promote to Administrator?
promote.body: This account will gain full admin rights, including access to this area.

demote.title: Demote to User?
demote.body: This account loses admin rights and can no longer access this area.
demote.warning: The last Administrator cannot be demoted. The server decides — its error message shows verbatim if it refuses.

guard.self: You can't perform this action on your own account.
guard.admin: You can't perform this action on another Administrator.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Generate a strong temp password for the user. It shows ONCE after you confirm — be ready to copy and hand it over out of band.
resetPassword.generatedHint: 12–16 chars, all classes. You can regenerate or edit before confirming.
resetPassword.revealBody: Copy it now. When you close this dialog the value disappears and cannot be viewed again.
resetPassword.copiedLive: Temp password copied to the clipboard.
resetPassword.warning: Copy it now — closing the dialog destroys this value. Never store or log it anywhere.
